headline: Super vs Orchids — personal AI agents for real computer work

site_brief.goal: Create a fair but persuasive competitor comparison page for Super vs Orchids. Use supplied sources for current facts, avoid fake claims, and make the practical argument that Super is better suited for repeated computer-use work because its cache can lower repeated execution cost.
site_brief.title: Super vs Orchids

summary: Orchids is a powerful AI app builder and IDE for generating full‑stack applications across many stacks. Super is built for a different job: durable personal AI agents that actually operate computers and reuse a computer‑use cache, so repeated workflows get faster and cheaper over time. This page fairly compares what Orchids excels at today — and where Super is the sharper alternative for ongoing computer‑use automation.
